text:
There was an old man who lived alone. He loved flowers. One Sunday, he planted a dozen tulips. They grew big. They waved in the wind. They made him smile a lot.

One day a girl with blond hair came by. She noticed the tulips. She picked one. Then another. Then another.

"I love those flowers," she said. "You must spend all day smiling?"

The old man smiled solemnly.

"Just a few every day."

One day she didn mornings. They talked. They chose tulips. They made dreams.

And so they grew together.

That's all.

The end.

You wish.
